Setlist
Venue Info
Media Gallery
Alpine Valley Music Theatre
East Troy, WI
Seating Capacity: 37000
Venue Type : Outdoor Amphitheater

Total Gigs: 38
  DMB  (37)
  Dave & Tim  (1)

Longest Performance:
07.01.06 - Seek Up (22:40)

Song Liberations
  7.2.06 – Last Stop, The (after 1059 days)
  8.9.08 – Spoon (after 1791 days)
  7.7.12 – Little Thing (after 5912 days)
  7.2.22 – Steady As We Go (after 1449 days)
Venue Picture
Description
Alpine Valley is a ski resort area in southeastern Wisconsin which also includes this massive 35,000+ capacity venue.

2699 Highway D
Elkhorn, WI 53121

(NOTE: The venue originally had an East Troy, WI 53120 address, but it changed in 2013. According to the venue's Twitter page, the change was made "because if you put East Troy into a GPS or online map website, it gives you an incorrect location. Elkhorn works correctly." At some undetermined time before the 2022 shows, the address reverted to East Troy.)

Songs that made their debut at this venue:
Super Freak (8.7.04)
Norwegian Wood (7.24.05)
A Dream So Real (8.26.07)
